digest.en: A major Russian attack on Ukraine killed eight and wounded dozens. The incident occurred as US President Donald Trump cancelled a visit by US envoys to Pakistan. Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met with Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif in Islamabad amid heightened tensions in the region.
digest.hi: दाऊद गैंग के खास गुर्गे सलीम डोला को तुर्किये में पुलिस ने गिरफ्तार कर लिया। खबरों में दावा है कि सलीम डोला पर कई अपराधों का आरोप है। उसकी गिरफ्तारी से गैंग के कामकाज पर असर पड़ सकता है।

articles.title: Major Russian attack on Ukraine kills eight, wounds dozens
articles.summary: Mexican authorities are investigating a car crash that killed two US agents, reportedly CIA employees, after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab. The agents were not permitted to operate in Mexico.

articles.title: Trump cancels U.S. envoys’ visit to Pakistan for talks; says 'does not mean restart of war'
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister met Pakistan's Army chief and resumed commercial flights from Tehran's airport. Iran resumes commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for the first time since the conflict with the U. S.

articles.title: Fabulous Lives Of Cartel Wives: Women Masterminds Of Latin Drug Businesses
articles.summary: Women play a significant role in Latin American cartel operations, involved at every level. Their involvement is a well-documented aspect of the region's complex and multifaceted organized crime landscape. Women have been involved in every level of cartel operations.

articles.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
articles.summary: The Mexican government claims that two US agents, reportedly CIA employees, were not authorized to operate in Mexico before their deaths in a car crash. The incident has raised questions about US activities on Mexican territory.

articles.title: Rights groups critical as Venezuela prisoner release scheme 'coming to an end'
articles.summary: Venezuela's prisoner release scheme, implemented under an amnesty law, is nearing its end. Despite the releases, over 500 political prisoners remain incarcerated, sparking criticism from rights groups. More than 500 political prisoners are thought to still be in jail, despite the releases since the amnesty law was brought in.

articles.title: Iran FM Says 'Yet To See If The US Is Truly Serious About Diplomacy'
articles.summary: US officials cancelled a trip to Pakistan for Iran talks, hours after Iranian Foreign Minister departed Islamabad. The decision was made by former US President Donald Trump, who had planned to send a delegation to Pakistan for diplomatic discussions with Iran.

articles.title: Reported US CIA agents killed in crash not authorised to operate: Mexico
articles.summary: Mexico is seeking details from the US after a car crash killed two US agents, reportedly CIA employees, who were not authorized to operate in Mexico. The incident has raised concerns about US activities on Mexican territory.

articles.title: Russia Targets Ukraine In Overnight Drone Attack, Parts Found In Romania
articles.summary: Russian drones crashed in Ukraine and Romania, prompting evacuations and a police cordon in Galati. The incident marks the latest escalation in the ongoing conflict between Russia and Ukraine. Details of the attack remain unclear.

articles.title: Iran FM Abbas Araghchi and Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif meet in Pakistan
articles.summary: Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi met Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif in Islamabad to revive US talks. Iranian FM Araghchi met Pakistani PM Sharif in Islamabad as part of efforts to revive direct negotiations with the US.

articles.title: Tottenham and West Ham both win, as heated battle to avoid relegation continues
articles.summary: Tottenham and West Ham both won their respective matches, maintaining their positions in the Premier League relegation battle. The victories came as a result of strong performances from both teams, with Tottenham defeating Southampton 3-1 and West Ham beating Everton 2-0.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'Not worth 18-hr flight' - Trump calls off Witkoff
articles.summary: Trump cancelled a trip to Pakistan by US negotiators after Iran skipped talks. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'Not worth 18-hr flight' - Trump calls off Witkoff, Kushner's Pak visit as Iran skips talks The Times of India.

articles.title: Pentagon Floats Suspending Spain From NATO in Leaked Email Fallout
articles.summary: The Pentagon considered suspending Spain from NATO membership in a leaked email, citing concerns over the country's military cooperation with Russia. The proposal was reportedly made in response to Spain's decision to purchase Russian-made military equipment.

articles.title: Palhinha scores late Tottenham goal at Wolves to end winless run
articles.summary: Palhinha scored a late goal for Tottenham at Wolves. The win ended Tottenham's winless run. Palhinha scores late Tottenham goal at Wolves to end winless run.

articles.title: Trump cancels US negotiators’ trip to Pakistan for peace talks as Araghchi leaves Islamabad without
articles.summary: Trump cancelled US negotiators' trip to Pakistan as Iranian FM Araghchi left Islamabad. Trump cancels US negotiators’ trip to Pakistan for peace talks as Araghchi leaves Islamabad without.

articles.title: 2 Missing, 1 Body, 1 Killer: In US University, Bangladeshi Students' Murder
articles.summary: One body was found at a US university where two Bangladeshi students are missing. Abugharbieh had studied at USF between 2021 and 2023. (HCSOSheriff). 2 Missing, 1 Body, 1 Killer: In US University, Bangladeshi Students' Murder.

articles.title: Taliban Government says Afghans in Qatar can return 'with full confidence'
articles.summary: The Taliban government told Afghans in Qatar they can return with full confidence. The US aims to move Afghans to a third country. A U. S. A U. S.

articles.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Armed groups launched co-ordinated attacks across Mali, sparking explosions and gunfire in the centre and north. The attacks are described as the largest jihadist assault in years, with witnesses reporting clashes.

articles.title: The 85-Year-Old Widow Snagged by Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
articles.summary: Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, an 85-year-old French widow, was deported due to Trump's immigration crackdown. In her first interview since being deported, Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, the French widow of a former G. I., recounted her experience in ICE detention.

articles.title: Beijing Warns Europe As Chinese Entities Included In Russia Sanctions
articles.summary: China demands removal of its entities from Russia sanctions lists. China demanded an immediate removal of Chinese entities from the sanctions list. Beijing Warns Europe As Chinese Entities Included In Russia Sanctions.

articles.title: Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil - politico.eu
articles.summary: Paris and Athens exchanged mutual defense pledges. Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil politico. eu. Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil - politico.

articles.title: Mali hit by wave of coordinated attacks from armed groups
articles.summary: Mali's capital Bamako was hit by coordinated attacks from armed groups. Gunfire and explosions have rocked Mali's capital Bamako and other key cities in one of the most significant coordinated attacks in years, as armed groups, including jihadist insurgents and separatist rebels exploit worsening insecurity in the Sahel region.

articles.summary: कांग्रेस नेता पवन खेड़ा पर बीजेपी ने हमला किया है. यह हमला गुवाहाटी हाई कोर्ट की टिप्पणी के बाद हुआ, जिसमें कहा गया कि मुख्यमंत्री की पत्नी के खिलाफ विदेशी पासपोर्ट दावे में शामिल लोगों की पहचान जरूरी है.

articles.title: ट्रंप के बार-बार हमलों पर भारत की नपी-तुली, संतुलित प्रतिक्रिया की वजह क्या है?
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति के भारत को 'धरती पर नरक' कहे जाने पर भारत की प्रतिक्रिया संतुलित रही. विपक्षी पार्टी कांग्रेस ने मोदी सरकार की प्रतिक्रिया को 'बेहद कमज़ोर' बताया. अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति के भारत को 'धरती पर नरक' कहे जाने वाले पोस्ट को लेकर कई प्रतिक्रियाएं आ रही हैं.

articles.title: मृणाल ठाकुर की जगह श्रुति हासन होंगी 'पेद्दी' का हिस्सा? फिल्म में कर सकती हैं ये खास काम
articles.summary: श्रुति हासन मृणाल ठाकुर की जगह फिल्म 'पेद्दी' में शामिल हो सकती हैं। यह फिल्म राम चरण की अदाकारी वाली है और जून 2026 में सिनेमाघरों में रिलीज होगी। राम चरण की अदाकारी वाली फिल्म 'पेद्दी' जून 2026 में सिनेमाघरों में रिलीज होने से पहले ही काफी चर्चा में है।
